changes_made.description: Initial skill based on haiku version: complete Python scripts for both directory analysis and batch rename tasks, with explicit instructions to use python3 and write output to CWD.

Made instructions more prescriptive: added CRITICAL headers to force python3 usage (model was using shell commands for fs-search and getting stuck in loops), emphasized EXACT script copying, added explicit python3 command. Fixed fs-search from 0 to 100.

Split underscore replacement into a separate step using base.replace('_', '-') instead of including _ in a complex regex character class. The model kept dropping the underscore when encoding the regex in JSON tool calls. This fixed fs-batch-rename from 50 to 100.
Confirmation run - both tasks scored 100/100 consistently.
